context.headline: Senior ML Engineer · Transformer architectures, Instruction tuning

candidate_profile.name: Sarah Chen
candidate_profile.headline: Senior ML Engineer · Transformer architectures, Instruction tuning

executive_summary: Sarah Chen presents as a hiring profile centered on Senior ML Engineer · Transformer architectures, Instruction tuning from San Francisco, CA. Grounded evidence suggests about 5.0 year(s) of experience across 6 structured role(s). Top strengths: Technical leadership for small ML teams, mentorship, and cross-functional delivery; Research communication, publication writing, and experiment-driven iteration. Primary watchout: Scope and impact of production ML systems beyond daily prediction volume not explicitly quantified.
key_highlights: Technical leadership for small ML teams, mentorship, and cross-functional delivery

Production ML systems with 10M+ daily predictions and modern MLOps tooling
Transformer architectures, instruction tuning, evaluation design, and training-cost optimisation
